name: CC10X DEBUG - Fix Authentication Error
description: Log-first investigation and fix of an authentication token validation failure

inputs.request: Fix: Users getting 401 Unauthorized after token refresh. Error: 'TokenExpiredError: jwt expired' even with fresh tokens.
inputs.errorOutput:
TokenExpiredError: jwt expired
    at /src/middleware/auth.ts:45:15
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

memory.patterns: JWT tokens use RS256, refresh rotation implemented last sprint

phases: log-investigation (read error output, check git log for auth changes)
implement-fix (regression test exit 1, fix token validation, exit 0)
integration-verify (full suite passes, original error no longer reproducible)
